name: Lo Mein Shrimp-Chicken-Pork-Beef Bgnj11
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti as directed on package, al dente. Drain and rinse in cold water. Add a few drops of oil and mix to prevent sticking. Set aside.
2. Slice steak very thin, across the grain, into 2-inch pieces. Mix together with steak, ginger, scallion, cornstarch, sugar, and light soy sauce. Set aside to marinate.
3. Heat wok to smoking. Add 2 tablespoons oil. Stir fry meat mixture for two minutes, do not overcook. Reserve.
4. Add 2 tablespoons oil, heat. Stir fry carrots and cabbage for two minutes. Add spaghetti and stir well. Cook a few minutes more. Add meat mixture, soy sauce, and salt. Stir until heated through and serve. Enjoy the versatility of stir-fry cooking—feel free to substitute or add other vegetables; you can't go wrong!
